zh.lifeSummary: 當Agnes Whitman於1519年1月11日出生在英國英格蘭薩默塞特哈德時，她的父親Henry Whitman57歲，母親Alice Axtell50歲。她於1540年與John Strong   I在英國薩默塞特結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和5個女兒的父母。她去世於1556年在英國英格蘭薩默塞特陶頓享年37歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭諾福爾可。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Agnes Whitman于1519年1月11日出生在英国英格兰薩默塞特哈德时，她的父亲Henry Whitman57岁，母亲Alice Axtell50岁。她于1540年与John Strong   I在英国薩默塞特结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和5个女儿的父母。她去世于1556年在英国英格兰薩默塞特陶頓享年37岁，埋葬在英国英格兰諾福爾可。

nameMeanings.name: Whitman
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (southern): from the Middle English personal name Whytman (Old English Hwītmann, from hwīt ‘white’ + mann ‘man’). Compare White 1 and also Wightman , with which this surname was probably confused.
History: John Whitman settled in Weymouth, MA, c. 1638. The poet Walt Whitman (1819–92) was descended from Joseph Whitman, who had settled in Stratford, CT, from England around 1660.

variants.name: White
meanings: English: from Middle English white, wit (Old English hwīt ‘white’), hence a nickname for someone with white hair or a pale complexion. In some cases it is perhaps from a Middle English survival of the Old English personal name Hwīta, a short form of names in Hwīt- (from hwīt ‘white’). The name may also be topographic, referring to someone who lived by a bend or curve in a river or road (from Old English wiht ‘bend’), the source of the placename of Great Whyte in Ramsey, Huntingdonshire (compare Wight ). This name is also a variant of Wight . The surname White is also very common among African Americans.

Irish and Scottish: adopted for any of several Irish and Scottish Gaelic names based on bán ‘white, fair’ (see Bain 1, McElwain ) or fionn ‘fair’ (see Finn 1). The English surname has been Gaelicized in Ireland as de Faoite.

Americanized form (translation into English) of various European surnames meaning ‘white’, for example German Weiss , French Blanc , Polish Białas (see Bialas ), Slovenian Belec , or any other synonymous Slavic surname beginning with Bel-, Bev-, Biel- or Bil-.

variants.name: Whiteman
meanings: Native American (also White Man): translation into English (and shortening) of a personal name based on a word, such as Lakota Sioux wašiču(ŋ), meaning ‘white man’.
Americanized form (translation into English) of German   Weissmann  .

nameMeanings.name: Agnes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized version of the Greek name Hagnē, from the feminine form of the adjective hagnos ‘pure, holy’. This was the name of a young Roman virgin martyred in the persecutions instigated by the Roman emperor Diocletian in ad 303 . She became a very popular saint in the Middle Ages. Her name was early associated with Latin agnus ‘lamb’, leading to the consistent dropping of the initial H- and to her representation in art accompanied by a lamb. The colloquial form Annes led to some confusion with Ann(e) in earlier centuries. Frequent in the medieval period, the name was revived in the 19th century, and has been especially popular in Scotland. See also Annis .

en.lifeSummary: When Agnes Whitman was born on 11 January 1519, in Chard, Somerset, England, United Kingdom, her father, Henry Whitman, was 57 and her mother, Alice Axtell, was 50. She married John Strong   I in 1540, in Somerset, England. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 5 daughters. She died in 1556, in Taunton, Somerset, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 37, and was buried in Norfolk, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Agnes Whitman est née le 11 janvier 1519, à Chard, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Henry Whitman, avait 57 ans et sa mère, Alice Axtell, avait 50 ans. Elle a épousé John Strong   I en 1540, à Somerset, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 5 filles. Elle est décédée en 1556, à Taunton, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 37 ans, et a été enterrée à Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Agnes Whitman am 11. Januar 1519 in Chard, Somerset, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Henry Whitman 57 und ihre Mutter Alice Axtell 50. Sie hat 1540 in Somerset, England John Strong   I geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Sie starb 1556 im Alter von 37 Jahren in Taunton, Somerset, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Norfolk, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Agnes Whitman è nata il il 11 gennaio 1519 nel Chard, Somerset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Henry Whitman, aveva 57 anni e sua madre, Alice Axtell, aveva 50 anni. Lei sposato John Strong   I nel 1540, nel Somerset, England. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 5 figlie. Morì nel 1556, nel Taunton, Somerset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 37 anni, e fu sepolta a Norfolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Agnes Whitmanが1519年1月11日にイギリスイギリスソメルセトチャードで生まれた時，父Henry Whitmanは57歳，母Alice Axtellは50歳であった。1540年にイギリスソメルセトでJohn Strong   Iと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼女は1556年にイギリスイギリスソメルセトタウントンで37歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスノーフォルクにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Agnes Whitman(이)가 1519년 1월 11일 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 처드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Henry Whitman(은)는 57세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Alice Axtell(은)는 50세였다. 그녀는 1540년 영국 서머세트에서 John Strong   I(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1556년 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 타운턴에서 37세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Agnes Whitman nasceu em 11 de janeiro de 1519, em Chard, Somerset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Henry Whitman, tinha 57 anos e sua mãe, Alice Axtell, tinha 50 anos. Ela casou-se com John Strong   I em 1540, em Somerset, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 5 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1556, em Taunton, Somerset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 37 anos, e foi sepultada em Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Agnes Whitman родилась 11 января 1519 г. в местности чард, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Henry Whitman было 57 лет, а матери, которую звали Alice Axtell, 50. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Strong   I в 1540 г. в местности сомирсет, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 5 дочерей. Она умерла в 1556 г. в местности таунтон, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 37 лет и была похоронена в местности норфолк, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Agnes Whitman nació el 11 de enero de 1519, en Chard, Somerset, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Henry Whitman, tenía 57 años y su mamá, Alice Axtell, tenía 50 años. Se casó con John Strong   I en 1540, en Somerset, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió en 1556, en Taunton, Somerset, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 37 años, y fue sepultada en Norfolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
